SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

Why that won't happen: The U.S. and Iran are locked in a standoff that will only break when one side decides it can no longer tolerate the pain. Who will move is unclear. . 2026-04-30: Now is the time to rebalance your portfolio and snap up these bonds, UBS says: Government bond yields have crept higher, presenting a compelling entry point for investors, according to the bank.. 2026-04-30: Inside the Fed: Powell vows he won't be a 'shadow chair,' but a Warsh clash will be tough to avoid: When the Fed gathers again, it will mark the first time a sitting and former chair conduct business together in nearly 80 years.. 2026-04-30: Trump says 'I don't think about' another assassination attempt: Trump also said he was not inclined to wear a bulletproof vest, as some people have suggested after the arrest of a gunman over the weekend.. 2026-04-30: Apple's stock has gone nowhere for 6 months. reports.. 2026-04-30: Trump signs executive order expanding retirement account access for workers: The president's executive order expands retirement account access for workers and will be integrated with the Saver's Match.. 2026-04-30: House strips MAHA-hated pesticide provisions from farm bill: MAHA advocates said the language that was stripped could have provided liability protection for Bayer in lawsuits involving its Roundup weedkiller.. 2026-04-30: AI boom: Big Tech capital expenditures now seen topping $1 trillion in 2027 : The overall cost has been causing heads to spin, but analysts director of Thiel Capital. . 2026-04-30: Trump to get briefed on potential Iran strikes before war hits key 60-day deadline: Reports: Iran has rejected further negotiations unless the U.S. blockade is
